question: Will Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DBAA once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-02-19) was 5.750. (The latest value released in Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield from the release Moody's Daily Corporate Bond Yield Averages.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: These instruments are based on bonds with maturities 20 years and above.
